ballot_measures.title: Initiative 85
ballot_measures.description: Increase penalties for fentanyl-related felonies, require treatment for certain drug offenses, and limit sentencing exceptions in fentanyl-related crimes that cause another person’s death. This citizen-initiated measure is on the Colorado 2026 ballot.

ballot_measures.title: Initiative 95
ballot_measures.description: Require law enforcement to notify the U.S. Department of Homeland Security when a person is charged with a crime of violence or has a prior felony conviction and the person’s immigration status cannot be determined. This citizen-initiated measure is on the Colorado 2026 ballot.
